loop1.title: UPS Capacity
loop1.note: Showing kVA, kW, and current load factors against nameplate; headroom is derived from active power load factor. Per-phase power and current reserves are not directly measured as distinct capacity limits, so the composite headroom reflects the primary active power constraint.

loop1.title: UPS Load
loop1.note: Showing average load % and current load kW; headroom is rated capacity (kW) — actual UPS headroom requires real-time input power vs rated capacity, which is not directly measured as a single delta column.

loop1.title: Output Load & Capacity — Composite
loop1.note: Showing load (active power) and frequency trends; readiness score, bypass voltage, and transfer counts are not measured by this asset and are omitted.
